textByHash.0160f8011504a8509b643d555941bd0657bc4fe8: : No, I have nothing I wish to get rid of. If you want to do some trading, there are plenty of shops and market stalls around though.
textByHash.0597c7c1c5e4247f75a0cb8843f0f4fafdea0bf7: I'd like two Mahogany drawers built.
textByHash.082e2dfeaa27ba8f5d3b0cde00c11f411827e24c: I'd like a Oak bed built.
textByHash.0accc2493d802617d64fdef6938b9192dfe9e26a: : I'm a little worried I've heard there's lots of people going about, killing citizens at random.
textByHash.0cd445489004da7e2587641c2979ef5afd0fce06: I'd like two Wooden drawers built.
textByHash.166b5e27187fbcdefd7c31702e839dfc402e22a5: I know son, it was a long journey. I just need to work out where we're going.
textByHash.242e7341346570d6678eef3e369135e488893000: : I suppose someone has to do it.
textByHash.404ad93d5cc3c9c8a90032a9e62f7d29c90257cf: I'd like my hat stand fixed.
textByHash.41e062ddab83f388d2ce4e3980de2b40574cf98e: : No, I don't want to buy anything!
textByHash.66b2acfda72665d98ea4d36ee1a79742e6c1565f: I'd like a Teak bed built.
textByHash.6e65cb9020ca3a596227557ad953313646b81f58: : I've heard there are many fearsome creatures that dwell under the ground...
textByHash.9aeac939195ac4bebb7a2b47b01f4c0b244528ef: Thank you so much! Would you like a cup of tea before you go?
textByHash.a3b67d468f5869329c738ea94450a9df7b619d16: I'd like a Mahogany bed built.
textByHash.ab0627667ef495d25ce968aded699ba14348d524: I'd like two Teak drawers built.
textByHash.c383cbf5cc3d1f9f9180c826ddbdd97330490d0e: I'd like a Wooden bed built.
textByHash.d1109f3759ba5d80e806c06c732e59cb0ef0e9be: : Get out of my way, I'm in a hurry!
textByHash.d1faaa2c02fc0562993a4eb63bd5f5f3f7b72842: : I'm sorry I cant help you there.
textByHash.f7a09e3556d76855aa7b43a0233465d12a7e9eb4: I'd like two Oak drawers built.
